---
title: "Assignment_03"
name: "Sharon Tsukernik"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Loading libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(phyloseq)
library(ANCOMBC)

install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install()
BiocManager::install("ANCOMBC")
install.packages("CVXR")

```

```{r}
files <- list.files(pattern = "\\.bracken$")

bracken_list <- lapply(files, function(file) {
  df <- read_tsv(file)
  df$sample <- file   # add sample name
  return(df)
})

combined <- bind_rows(bracken_list)
head(combined)

combined$sample <- gsub(".bracken", "", combined$sample)

write_tsv(combined, "results/bracken_output.txt")

table(combined$sample)

unique(combined$taxonomy_lvl)

# Filtering to Species
combined_species <- combined %>%
  filter(taxonomy_lvl == "S")

# Converting to abundance matrix
otu <- combined_species %>%
  select(sample, name, new_est_reads) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = name,
              values_from = new_est_reads,
              values_fill = 0)

head(otu)

otu_mat <- as.data.frame(otu)

rownames(otu_mat) <- otu_mat$sample
otu_mat <- otu_mat[,-1]

dim(otu_mat)

write.csv(otu_mat, "results/otu_matrix.csv")

getwd()
list.files()

metadata <- data.frame(
  sample = rownames(otu_mat)
)

rownames(metadata) <- metadata$sample
```


```{r}
# Building phyloseq object

# creating taxonomy table
tax <- data.frame(Species = colnames(otu_mat))
rownames(tax) <- colnames(otu_mat)

# creating phyloseq object
ps <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(otu_mat, taxa_are_rows = FALSE),
  tax_table(as.matrix(tax)),
  sample_data(metadata)
)

ps

sample_data(ps)
```

```{r} 

# Relative abundance
ps_rel <- transform_sample_counts(ps, function(x) x / sum(x))
df <- psmelt(ps_rel)

# Remove duplicate column
df <- df %>% select(-sample)

# Get top 10 species
top_taxa <- df %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Abundance)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  pull(Species)

# Group others
df_clean <- df %>%
  mutate(Species_clean = ifelse(Species %in% top_taxa, Species, "Other")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Species_clean) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

# Add diet groups
df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  mutate(Diet = ifelse(Sample %in% c("SRR8146935","SRR8146936","SRR8146938"),
                       "Omnivore",
                       "Vegan"))

# Plot
ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = Sample, y = Abundance, fill = Species_clean)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~Diet, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance", x = "Sample", fill = "Species") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8))

# Save plot
ggsave("results/relative_abundance_by_diet.png", width = 10, height = 6)


```

```{r}
# Alpha diversity

plot_richness(ps)

# Shannon index
alpha_df <- estimate_richness(ps, measures = c("Shannon"))
alpha_df$Sample <- rownames(alpha_df)
alpha_df$Diet <- ifelse(alpha_df$Sample %in% c("SRR8146935","SRR8146936","SRR8146938"),
                         "Omnivore",
                         "Vegan")

ggplot(alpha_df, aes(x = Diet, y = Shannon, fill = Diet)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Alpha Diversity (Shannon Index)",
       x = "Diet",
       y = "Shannon Diversity") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("results/alpha_diversity_shannon.png", width = 6, height = 5)

t.test(Shannon ~ Diet, data = alpha_df)
```

```{r}
# Beta diversity

ord <- ordinate(ps, method = "PCoA", distance = "bray")

plot_ordination(ps, ord) + 
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sample), vjust = -1)

ggsave("pcoa_plot.png")

colnames(plot_data)
rownames(otu_mat)

plot_data$sample <- rownames(otu_mat)


plot_data <- plot_ordination(ps, ord, justDF = TRUE)
head(plot_data)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Axis.1, y = Axis.2)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sample), vjust = -1) +
  labs(title = "PCoA (Bray-Curtis)",
       x = "PCoA1",
       y = "PCoA2") +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
# ANCOMB

# Adding diet to phyloseq
metadata <- data.frame(
  Sample = rownames(otu_mat),
  Diet = ifelse(rownames(otu_mat) %in% c("SRR8146935","SRR8146936","SRR8146938"),
                "Omnivore",
                "Vegan")
)

rownames(metadata) <- metadata$Sample

ps <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(otu_mat, taxa_are_rows = FALSE),
  tax_table(as.matrix(tax)),
  sample_data(metadata)
)


```
